source_intake_record.raw_question_text: For the feedback system \( G(s) = \frac{1}{(s+1)(s+2)} \), the 2% settling time of the step response is required to be less than 2 seconds. Which one of the following compensators \( C(s) \) achieves this?

image field contains a PIL image object placeholder, not a path or URL

image_manifest contains 1 image, but registry metadata does not indicate it is necessary for solving
multi_step: The task asks which compensator satisfies a quantitative performance constraint (2% settling time < 2 s), which typically requires analyzing closed-loop dynamics rather than direct lookup
There are 4 candidate compensators to compare against the same system requirement
The prompt combines plant dynamics G(s) and a transient-response specification, indicating at least condition-combination and comparison steps
verifiability: answer_type=short_text and the provided answer matches one of the explicit multiple-choice options
The requirement is quantitative and well-specified (2% settling time less than 2 seconds), enabling objective checking
